title: Guns, Cars and Morph
description: Guns, Cars, Morph and Mutant Mobs what more could you ask for in a Modpack.
body:
![Banner Header](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/GUNS_CARS_MORPH/BH_GUNS_CARS_MORPH_Header.webp)
[![Banner Bisecthosting](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/GUNS_CARS_MORPH/BH_GUNS_CARS_MORPH_Promo.webp)](https://tinyurl.com/amy67484)
![Banner Overview](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/GUNS_CARS_MORPH/BH_GUNS_CARS_MORPH_Overview.webp)
---
**Guns, Cars and Morph** is a tech/fantasy focused modpack. Designed for players to enjoy themselves as they traverse through the world, enjoy the odd mutant monter, or perhaps driving in a car with a gun out the window is more your style. Don't feel like being human, tranform into the mobs you slay, run around as a mutant zombie or perhaps a mutant skeleton is more your style. This modpack is designed to be relaxing with minimal changes to the vanilla content, enjoy a host of fun mods without bending to performance or gameplay limitations.

[![curseforge](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/available/curseforge_vector.svg)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/guns-cars-and-morph)
[![modrinth](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/available/modrinth_vector.svg)](https://modrinth.com/modpack/guns-cars-and-morph)
[![kofi-plural-alt](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/donate/kofi-plural-alt_vector.svg)](https://ko-fi.com/kesselot)
# Features
- [✔️] **Mob Morphs** - Morph into all your favourite mobs and more!
- [✔️] **New Movement** - Avoid getting killed with your ParCool skills!
- [✔️] **Guns & Weapons** - Get locked and loaded with TacZ and Superbwafare!
## [Modpack Discord](https://discord.gg/N8tUm6N4Qc)
### Modpack Notes
- **If you are a Youtuber or Content Creator playing this Modpack, put a link in the description linking back to this page so people know the Modpack you are using.**
- **Reupload of this Modpack or any modified version is not allowed allowed on Modrinth or CurseForge, this includes redistribution to any other website.** (_Unless given explicit permission by myself_)
